The branch expands marketplace feed config/schema/help/types to accept signed verification profiles with Ed25519 keys and thresholds, alongside the stacked envelope verifier/helper extraction.

PR surface: Source +296, Tests +240. Total +536 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/configuration PR, not a bug report. The blocker is source-proven by signed config becoming valid while refresh still ignores signature enforcement.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual maintainer/security review is needed because the remaining blocker is whether to publish this trust config before enforcement, and the PR has a protected maintainer label.

target.title: feat: add signed marketplace feed config
target.body:
## Summary

- extend marketplace feed verification config to support signed mode with local Ed25519 signing keys and an optional threshold
- validate signed feed trust anchors in the OpenClaw config schema, including key shape and threshold bounds
- document the new config fields in generated help and labels, and carry the verification shape into the official external catalog feed profile type

## Stack

- Stacked after #98299 (`feeds-trust-envelope-verifier`).
- This PR intentionally targets `main` as a draft because the dependency branch is on the fork; review should focus on the top commit `a419080f03` until #98299 lands.

## Scope boundaries

This is a config-contract slice only. It does not wire signed envelope verification into marketplace refresh, does not persist snapshot trust state, does not change CLI/operator output, and does not change install eligibility.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts src/infra/device-identity.test.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog-envelope.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/config/types.marketplaces.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/config/types.marketplaces.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
OpenClaw config now accepts signed marketplace feed verification profiles only when local Ed25519 public signing keys are provided and the optional threshold is valid. Invalid signed profiles fail schema parsing before any later refresh enforcement consumes them.

Real environment tested:
Windows source checkout at `C:\src\openclaw-feeds-trust-source-profiles`, stacked on #98299 head `8742cc6515`; source-level config schema tests and targeted OpenClaw validation commands.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
2. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts src/infra/device-identity.test.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog-envelope.test.ts`
3. `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings src/config/types.marketplaces.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
4. `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/config/types.marketplaces.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/zod-schema.marketplaces.test.ts`
5. `git diff --check`

Evidence after fix:
The focused marketplace schema test passed with 11 tests, and the broader focused shard set passed across schema help, marketplace schema, device identity, and envelope verifier tests. Targeted lint, targeted format, and whitespace checks completed without findings.

Observed result after fix:
Signed marketplace feed config with valid local Ed25519 keys and threshold parses successfully; missing keys, empty keys, invalid public keys, zero threshold, and threshold greater than key count are rejected.

What was not tested:
No live marketplace refresh behavior was tested because this PR does not wire signed envelope enforcement into refresh or snapshot persistence yet.
